lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How you doing, Smol Heredit?

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: I'm still disappointed that my father failed against you. I will suffer in humiliation alongside him for the rest of time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Understandable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Smol Heredit.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Mankind's variation frightens me.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: The way they saw this universe, their modes of impression, differed so greatly from one another that to read their stories, to know their lives, is to wonder if they were not many species in one.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: It was as if they had ranged across the actions of a thousand species and taken them for their own.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: For nearly two thousand years they dreamed in a creative mania without antecedent.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: They looked into the eyes and minds of other species and with their own intellect superseded them.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: They destroyed many, coopted others, and in the space between necessity and carelessness, left some to grow as untended as any species could in the wake of their ubiquity.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: They swarmed across the continents and oceans of a Gielinor they called their own, and shattered it into a billion imbricate worlds.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: And they were, by the twisted jungles of their slaughterhouses, ruthless and aloof beyond measure.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: The worst of us.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: A superpredator.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: A bringer of mass extinction.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: All mountains move and all giants are mountains.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We rest upon their shoulders.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: The world has grown older, senescent.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We are chimpanzee, we are gorilla, we are orangutan, and we are baboon and more.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We are, whether we like it or not, the blood legatees of humanity.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We are the children of men, but our mistakes will not be their mistakes.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We are telling a story.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We are telling a story of life, of what it means to live together in this universe, with vastly different modes of being, of seeing, of knowing.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Of sharing our own internal worlds with each other and making the universe we live in better for it. The empathy of a mind speaking to another mind, a vastly different mind, and yet each understanding each.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: And if not, if the barriers seem too great, then striving to overcome them.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Sorrow in what humanity did to this world, in the horrors they unleashed, in their cataclysm of despair, in the tens of thousands of species that will never walk or swim or fly again.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Extinctions abounded in their wake, and yet look now at this sunbright land, at the joys we have brought to it, to have bound the chaotic climate to our will.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: To have thought deeply of the future of this world, a sense of respect, of shared reverence for it and all who live within it.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: We have strung the close sky with life.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Be proud.

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: And empathy, once limited only to mankind and some few species, now extends across all lands, across all time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, but what?!

sections.title: Battling another pet in the arena in the Menagerie

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Gah

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Ha!

lines.speaker: Smol Heredit
lines.text: Hng!
